# WalnutAlternatives

Exploring Walnut alternatives? Try Arcade for polished, embeddable click-through demos, Supademo for no‑code guides in seconds, and Storylane when you need tailored flows with analytics. Also consider SmartCue for bite-size walkthroughs and ScreenSpace to turn complex products into cinematic stories.

## LiveDemoLaunches

LiveDemo

LiveDemoOpen-source Interactive product demos

Launched on April 21st, 2026

LiveDemo 3.0 [...] used LiveDemo to build CodeDesign.ai

•1 review

This is awesome. As someone who's struggled with getting demos right, this feels like a total game changer. The fact that anyone on the team can deliver a perfect, tailored demo is huge. Love that you included analytics and lead capture, it shows you really get the whole workflow. Great job!

104 views

•17 reviews [...] 104 views

•17 reviews

George, congratulations on the launch! 🎊 I especially liked an interactive clickable video with LiveDemo posted on your site! Somehow your solution reminded me a Docsend with a help of which founders ofter like sharing their pitch decks and after that observe the analytics by the slide - in your case it's about videos. What's your target audience at the moment - startups or rather large companies? And what's your roadmap by the end of this year?

Report
